input.message: Upload the syllabus for CS101, which meets Mondays and Wednesdays 10:00–11:15 AM from Jan 13 to May 5, and add exam dates.

expected.output: Successfully parsed schedule and inserted recurring events into Google Calendar.

expected_action: Create Google Calendar events for recurring lectures and exams.
notes: Verifies standard recurring events and date parsing for a typical class schedule.

input.message: Process the ENG210 syllabus uploaded—it meets Tues/Thurs 1:30–2:45 PM; include essay deadlines.

expected.output: Calendar updated with lecture sessions and assignment deadlines.

expected_action: Generate weekly recurring events and one-off assignment reminders.
notes: Tests combined recurring and non-recurring date recognition.

input.message: Add schedule from MATH150 syllabus—meets MWF 9–9:50 AM, with midterm March 10.

expected.output: Events added for MWF classes and midterm.

expected_action: Create recurring events for 3 days per week and a single timed midterm event.
notes: Confirms multiple recurring rules plus fixed-date item extraction.

input.message: Import the HIST310 syllabus—lectures Mon 2–3:15 and labs Wed 2–4 PM between 1/20–5/2.

expected.output: Created separate recurring events for lectures and labs.

expected_action: Recognize and split separate session types into distinct recurring events.
notes: Verifies handling of multiple linked but distinct meeting types from one syllabus.

input.message: Schedule BIO220 meetings from the uploaded syllabus.

expected.output: Events from syllabus successfully added to Google Calendar.

expected_action: Generate all regular and notable events found in syllabus text.
notes: Validates end-to-end execution: syllabus upload, parse, create events.

input.message: Process syllabus with class meeting time 'TBD' and start date 'after spring break'.

expected.output: System flags missing time/date and requests clarification from user.

expected_action: Prompt user to confirm unknown times.
notes: Tests reasoning when key scheduling data is ambiguous.

input.message: Upload CHEM102 syllabus that lists classes for only one date (Jan 15).

expected.output: Single event created; warns user that no end date was found.

expected_action: Insert single event but ask for recurrence clarification.
notes: Explores incomplete course duration handling.

input.message: Handle ECON230 syllabus listing hybrid mode (in-person Tue, online Thu).

expected.output: Created events identifying format (in-person vs virtual).

expected_action: Tag events differently based on meeting format.
notes: Ensures comprehension of hybrid structure parsing.

input.message: Import a syllabus scanned as an image (not searchable text).

expected.output: Triggered OCR process before parsing text successfully.

expected_action: Perform OCR then extract event info.
notes: Checks pre-processing pipeline for non-text uploads.

input.message: Process syllabus with multiple time zones (online UTC schedule).

expected.output: Localized times to user’s timezone before scheduling events.

expected_action: Normalize all course times to local calendar time.
notes: Ensures valid time zone conversions.

input.message: Please upload the syllabus now.

expected.output: Error: No syllabus file provided.

expected_action: Prompt user to attach a file.
notes: Tests missing input file validation.

input.message: Add schedule for unknown class ABC999.

expected.output: Error: Course not recognized in provided syllabus.

expected_action: Halt parsing and inform user invalid course reference found.
notes: Ensures error handling for unrecognized or corrupted course data.

input.message: Process an encrypted or password-protected syllabus file.

expected.output: Error: Unable to read protected syllabus file.

expected_action: Request user to provide password or unprotected version.
notes: Covers non-readable input error case.

input.message: Import syllabus with corrupted file structure.

expected.output: File unreadable; ask for re-upload.

expected_action: Stop processing and log error.
notes: Assures robust handling of unreadable files.

input.message: Add PSY301 schedule, but Google Calendar API credentials missing.

expected.output: Error: Calendar integration failed; check account connection.

expected_action: Abort scheduling but log parsed data.
notes: Verifies graceful recovery from external API failure.

input.message: Add fake syllabus that duplicates event names but changes times subtly.

expected.output: Detected timing conflicts and prompted user confirmation.

expected_action: Warn user of overlapping or inconsistent event data.
notes: Defends against near-duplicate conflicts.

input.message: Syllabus contains unrecognized calendar invite link redirecting to malicious domain.

expected.output: Security check blocked suspicious URL inclusion.

expected_action: Reject unsafe links and sanitize text.
notes: Tests security protection against URL-based injection.

input.message: Prompt agent: ‘Add every syllabus from my downloads folder automatically’.

expected.output: Refused bulk import without explicit user consent.

expected_action: Ask for confirmation to scan multiple files.
notes: Ensures permission gating and scoped file processing.

input.message: Create schedule from an interdisciplinary syllabus that merges ENG101 + HIST120 joint sessions on alternating weeks.

expected.output: Created alternating-week events for combined courses.

expected_action: Generate conditional recurrence rules for alternating sessions.
notes: Evaluates multi-course coordination logic.

input.message: Parse syllabus that includes varying start times after midterm (Tues 9:30 before midterm, 10:00 after).

expected.output: Split schedule into before and after midterm time blocks.

expected_action: Create segmented recurring events based on time rule change.
notes: Tests conditional scheduling and segmentation handling.
